title: Enchanted Book Covers
description: Custom covers for each enchanted book.
body:
This pack provides unique covers for each enchanted book! (Although if there are multiple enchantments it just kinda picks one :/ )

Books containing the max level of their enchantment have a gold trim, making it easier to see at a glance if you need to reroll your librarian's trades for time #1,006.

*The original book texture comes from Valerii Kim's [Tales of Jobutara](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/tales-of-jobutara-kingdoms-ii-sun-ver/) resource pack.*

**Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT Resewn!](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)**
